journey_note_title: Want to customize and do more?
journey_note_desc: Drop us a message and our team will contact you to build what you need!
journey_empty_desc: Currently don’t have any Journey enabled. Browse our <1>Journey libraries</1> or request a <3>customized solution</3>!
journey_remove_dialog_title: Are you sure to remove this Journey?
journey_save_and_exit_dialog_title: Want to save your hard work before exit?
journey_save_and_exit_dialog_desc: You haven’t saved your edits yet. If you choose to discard and exit directly, all your unsaved changes will be lost.
journey_not_able_to_save_dialog_title: The edits can not be saved with missing required fields.
journey_not_able_to_save_dialog_desc: Please double check and be sure to fill out all required fields with the asterisk* before saving again. Thanks
journey_email_campaign_brief: Send engaging email newsletters to your subscribers. Track and evaluate your campaigns effortlessly.
journey_email_campaign_why_use: Keep your audience engaged, boost awareness, and drive conversions with well-crafted email newsletters
journey_email_campaign_description: Revolutionize your email campaigns with this journey. Effortlessly manage subscriptions, and send newsletters to all or specific targeted groups with personalized email content. Develop and save email templates for consistency and efficiency. Stay on top of your strategy by tracking and analyzing campaign performance. Elevate your email engagement, reach, and grow your customer base now!
journey_email_campaign_short_description: Draft email newsletter and send to subscribers
journey_email_campaign_senders_email_too: What customers will see when they receive the emails. This sender’s email will be for display only
journey_email_campaign_senders_email_emp: Setup your sender’s email to proceed and use this journey. This will be the email address that customers see when they receive the email newsletters.
journey_email_campaign_feature_basics_de: We have you covered! The following features has been set up for you to engage with your audiences via email newsletters and run email campaigns.
journey_email_campaign_feature_basics_se: View all your subscribed audiences on the “Contacts” CRM Board with “Opt-In” under the “Opt-Out Status” field. Manage the subscription easily with email service, and opt-in/opt-out status.
Create and Manage Email Newsletter Templates
Create the email newsletters and save as a template for future usage to streamline the work process with efficiency and consistency.
Access and share the web URL of opt-in/opt-out email newsletter page anywhere you need. You can also use (sharable URL)/(email)/subscribe or (sharable URL)/(email)/unsubscribe to take quick actions.
Open/Read status of the sent newsletter will be shown on the “Email Outbound Records” Data Board to better evaluate and optimize your campaign performance.
journey_email_campaign_ready_to_use_what: You’re almost there! Once you save and activate, the related data board will be set up for you. Now you can manage all newsletter subscription on the “Contacts” CRM data board by changing the “Opt-Out Status”. And all newsletters sent to your audiences will be shown on the “Email Outbound Records” data board from now on.
journey_email_campaign_ready_to_use_bloc: How can I manage my email templates?
You can find all your saved email templates and create new templates on the “Templates” page under the “Email Templates” tab.
journey_email_campaign_starter_desc: Create a new campaign and start to draft a new email newsletters to your target audiences. You can also select and use saved email templates.
journey_email_campaign_starter_basics_ca: Create this Email newsletter with a running Campaign
Add tag for campaign management. The options share across all email journeys
Currently don’t have any campaign tag created.
journey_email_campaign_starter_audience_: Send Newsletters to All Email Opted-In Subscribers
Send to all contacts with “Opt-In” status on the “Contacts” CRM Board
Send Newsletters with Data Board Segmentation
Send to existing Segmentation audience on a board who is not “Opt-Out”
Please select the CRM or data board with the audience source
If you don’t see what you need, please create the segmentation on the source board first
Please select which board field as the email to reach
journey_email_campaign_starter_newslette: Start to draft your email content here...
journey_email_campaign_subscribe_success: You should start to receive emails with important updates from us now.
journey_email_campaign_unsubscribe_succe: We’re sorry to see you go. You will no longer receive email campaign from us. If you’ve unsubscribed by mistake, <1>re-subscribe here</1>.
journey_email_campaign_subscribe_to_news: Subscribe to the newsletter to get the latest updates.
journey_email_campaign_unsubscribe_desc: Once you unsubscribe, you will stop receiving email newsletters and losing awesome resources from us.
journey_email_campaign_opt_in_desc: Subscribe to the newsletter to get the latest updates.
journey_email_campaign_opt_out_desc: Once you opt-out, you will stop receiving emails and losing awesome resources from us.
journey_email_campaign_opt_in_successful: You should start to receive emails with important updates from us now.
journey_email_campaign_opt_out_successfu: You’ve Opted-Out From our email services!
We’re sorry to see you go. You will no longer receive emails from us. If you’ve opted-out by mistake, <1>re-opt-in here</1>.
journey_email_campaign_remove_dialog_des: The journey setting and associated scheduled activities will be deleted and can not be undone. Subscription services will be stopped immediately. Existing records on the Data Board will not be affected.
journey_email_outbound_description: Elevate your email outreach with this journey. Effortlessly send personalized outbound emails to your contacts, whether for sales, follow-ups, support, or customer engagement. Manage your contact lists efficiently and segment them for targeted content. Customize your emails to resonate with specific audiences, ensuring a personal touch. Track open rates and responses to optimize and refine your approach. Streamline your email outreach, foster stronger connections, and drive meaningful interactions with your audience now!
journey_email_outbound_basic_description: Send this outbound with a name for easier internal management and use of re-engagement
journey_email_outbound_basic_tags_descri: Add tag to this outbound for easier internal management. The options share across all email journeys
journey_email_outbound_confirm_send_inst: Do you want to send this email instantly?
journey_email_outbound_send_instantly_gu: Click "SEND" to send the email immediately, or  "BACK" to make changes.
journey_email_outbound_segmentation_guid: If you don’t see what you need, please create the segmentation on the source board first
journey_email_outbound_email_guide: Please select which board field as the email to reach
journey_email_outbound_submit_success_ti: Relax as we send Your messages now
journey_email_outbound_submit_success_ex: Processed messages will appear as a new record on the outbound data board with success/fail status.
journey_email_outbound_senders_email_emp: Setup your sender’s email to proceed and use this journey. This will be the email address that customers see when they receive the email outbound.
journey_email_outbound_feature_basics_se: Send Single or Group Email Outbounds
Send outbound emails to both individual contacts and group receivers with ease, allowing for flexible communication strategies.
Personalize and Send Targeted Messaging to Audience Segments
Manage audience segmentation on CRM and Data Board to allow tailored emails for specific audiences, delivering content that resonates with each recipient.
Create and Apply Organization Saved Email Templates
Create the email content and save as a template for future usage to streamline the work process with efficiency and consistency. Manage all templates under “Templates” page.
Optimize Outbound Strategies with Engagement Analytics
Open/Read status of the sent outbound will be shown on the “Email Outbound Records” Data Board to better evaluate and optimize your outbound performance.
journey_email_outbound_ready_to_use_what: You’re almost there! Once you save and activate, the related data board will be set up for you. Now you can manage all contacts email service subscription on the “Contacts” CRM data board by changing the “Opt-Out Status”. And all outbounds sent to your audiences will be shown on the “Email Outbound Records” data board from now on.
journey_email_outbound_remove_dialog_des: The journey setting and associated scheduled activities will be deleted and can not be undone. Subscription services will be stopped immediately. Existing records on the Data Board will not be affected.
journey_email_outbound_short_description: Send direct email outbound to individual or group receivers.
journey_whatsapp_outbound_brief: Send outbound message to customer through WhatsApp with existing WhatsApp message templates.
journey_whatsapp_outbound_why_use: Connect effectively with targeted customers through impactful interactions, including reminders, promotions, outreaches, etc
journey_whatsapp_outbound_description: Elevate your outreach strategy with this outbound journey! Seamlessly send approved WhatsApp message templates to targeted contacts or segments saved on iMBrace Data Board. Whether scheduling strategic follow-ups or initiating immediate engagement, our tool empowers your team for increased efficiency and higher conversions. It's the ultimate companion—unlock a new level of outreach success now.
journey_whatsapp_outbound_short_descript: Send WhatsApp outbound messages to individuals or customer segmentations with existing WhatsApp message templates.
journey_whatsapp_outbound_remove_dialog_: The journey setting will be deleted and cannot be undone. But existing records on the Data Board will not be affected.
journey_facebook_social_media_management: Facebook Social Media Management
Sync your comments on your Facebook post and with the AI assistant help to detect positive/negative/neutral content to trigger specified actions.
Enhance customer engagement, streamline communication, and proactively shape brand perception.

Revolutionize social media management with this app. Seamlessly sync Facebook Page comments to your iMBrace Data Board. Have our AI-powered assistant categorize the comments as Positive, Neutral, or Negative, empowering you to understand sentiment at a glance. Take control with auto-outbound messages tailored to each categorized group, enhancing engagement effortlessly. Elevate your marketing and sales experience & efficiency to the next level. Start to engage with the customers and connect your channels today!
Sync your Facebook posts and comments with categorization, outbound, and data analytics.
The journey setting will be deleted and cannot be undone. The sync and updates will stop immediately. But existing records on the Data Board will not be affected.
journey_facebook_leads_management_brief: Sync Facebook ad lead form leads to iMBrace data board to capture and manage in one place.
journey_facebook_leads_management_why_us: Consolidate lead generation and empower the team with all information they need
journey_facebook_leads_management_descri: Streamline lead management with this journey. Seamlessly sync Meta Business Suite Leads Center leads to iMBrace Data Boards as new records. Effortlessly capture and connect Facebook leads from ad lead form submissions to the right team. Empower your team to convert more potential clients today!
journey_facebook_leads_management_short_: Sync Facebook ad lead form leads to iMBrace data board to capture and manage in one place
journey_business_contact_collector_brief: Easily create contacts to Data Board with individual/bulk creation or seamless CSV imports.
journey_business_contact_collector_why_u: Simplify contact collection and fuel business expansion to enhance customer relationships
journey_business_contact_collector_descr: Streamline contact management effortlessly! Capture individual contacts during in-person interactions, calls, meetings, and events. Manage bulk contacts through manual entries, ensuring no lead is missed. Import contacts in seconds with CSV files for streamlined communication. Elevate your marketing and sales efforts with this seamless journey, building a strong foundation for outbound and future business engagements.
journey_ai-assistant_management_brief: Engage with customers in conversations with identity and materials provided during setup.
journey_ai-assistant_management_why_use: Provide a more dynamic engagement and support experience with lower cost of resources
journey_ai-assistant_management_descript: Transform customer engagement with tailored AI assistants across all channels. Provide swift responses supported by a knowledge base from your uploaded materials in various formats. This modern approach to FAQs and support ensures efficiency and dynamic interaction, boosts customer satisfaction and drives business growth. Start to utilize the power of technology and provide a better experience for your customer and your team now!
journey_ai-assistant_management_short_de: Incorporate the tailored AI assistants into the channel conversation flow

journey_facebook_channel_empty: You need to connect a Facebook channel to proceed and use this journey. Please add a new Facebook channel below or contact your organization admins for help.
journey_facebook_social_media_management: Do you want to connect your leads from Facebook to WhatsApp? We can help you set up in this Facebook default workflow now.

When someone sends you a message on Facebook, they will be asked to share their WhatsApp number. The number they provide will be saved to your Data Board Contacts automatically. You can also set it up yourself in Channel Workflow later.
Your Facebook default workflow has been set up successfully. You can continue the journey!
You can also find and edit this Facebook default workflow in the “Channel Workflow” tab under the “Workflows” page later.
We have you covered! The following setting has been set up for you to manage and maintain an uplifting online presence effortlessly.
Sync incoming comments on Facebook page to a Data Board
All new incoming comments on the linked Facebook page will be synced to the associated Data Board (for Facebook comments) as a new record.
Classify incoming Facebook comments by our AI Assistant
Our AI-assistant will classify incoming comments on connected Facebook page into one of the three groups: Positive/Neutral/Negative.
Sync posts performance and data analytics
All posts on the linked Facebook page will be synced to the associated Data Board (for Facebook posts) with the total number of reactions (like, love, care, haha, wow, sad or angry).
To best customize the experience that works for you, you can set up additional settings below to tailor the Journey to meet your needs.
Assign incoming comments to a team member
The assigned team member will receive a notification when a new comment comes in from the specified group below.
Assign all incoming comments
Assign negative comments (classified by AI-assistant)
Assign positive comments (classified by AI-assistant)
Assign neutral comments (classified by AI-assistant)
Delete Negative Comments
Automatically remove newly classified negative comments (by our AI-assistant) from the Facebook page posts. Negative comments existing before this journey setup will not be affected.
Send automatic outbound messages to users who made incoming comments
Based on the comment classification group, a tailored auto-outbound message can be sent to the Facebook users.
To all incoming comments
To negative comments (classified by AI-assistant)
To positive comments (classified by AI-assistant)
To neutral comments (classified by AI-assistant)
Sent through Facebook Messenger
Facebook Messenger outbound message content...
Delay the outbound message
Send the outbound message with up to 90 seconds delay after receiving the comments to be less disturbing to the users.
How many seconds do you want to delay...
Sent as a comment reply on the post
Outbound comment reply content...
Same setting as Facebook Messenger outbound
The content for comment reply and delay time will be the same as Facebook Messenger settings above
Delay the outbound comment reply
How many seconds do you want to delay...
Send the outbound comment reply with up to 90 seconds delay after receiving the comments to be less disturbing to the users.

You’re almost there! Once you save and activate, the related data board will be set up for you. Any incoming Facebook comments on your page will be synced onto the “Facebook Comments” data board with the feature settings you enabled. And data analytics of your page posts will be synced and updated on the “Facebook Posts” data board from now on.
journey_change_settings_later: What if I want to change my settings later?
journey_change_settings_later_desc: You can find all your added journeys on the “Installed” tab on “Journeys” page and change the settings you’ve walked through with the card action menu “Edit Setting”.
journey_ai-assistant_management_channel_: You currently don’t have any AI assistant associated with this Open AI account. Create and setup the first one below or choose another account in the last step.

Upon saving and activating, you will see all assistants from your Open AI account listed workflow presets in workflow right navigation. Add them to any workflow as ready-to-be-connected AI assistant connector. Now, drag and connect the AI assistant wherever needed!
How can I manage my AI assitants?
To manage all AI assistants linked to your OpenAI account, navigate to the "Edit Setting" under Apps card action menu. In "Setup AI Assistant", you can create, edit, or delete any assistants.
journey_ai-assistant_management_remove_d: The journey setting and related AI assistants in the Workflow presets will be deleted and can not be undone.
journey_whatsapp_outbound_channel_empty: You need to connect a WhatsApp channel to proceed and use this journey. Please add a new WhatsApp channel below or contact your organization admins for help.
journey_whatsapp_outbound_whats_next_des: You’re almost there! Once you save and activate, you will see a new journey card added for you in the Journeys page with the connected WhatsApp channel name. Click on the app card to start a new single or group WhatsApp outbound, and the sent outbounds will be stored on the “WhatsApp Outbound Records” data board for you.
journey_facebook_leads_management_featur: We have you covered! The following setting has been set up for you to manage and maintain an uplifting online presence effortlessly.
Sync leads captured from Facebook ad lead forms to a Data Board
All new incoming leads captured by completing lead forms on Meta Business Suite Leads Center will be synced to the associated Data Board (for Facebook leads) as a new record.
Empower the team to manage leads and do more with outbounds
Use the synced Facebook ad lead as the source of WhatsApp outbound or email campaign to engage with your potential cusotmers and close the marketing and sales loop now.
journey_facebook_leads_management_ready_: You’re almost there! Once you save and activate, the related data board will be set up for you. Now you can manage all your Facebook leads from ad lead forms on the “Facebook Leads” data board. You can assign the leads to the team and track the progress of the leads now.
journey_facebook_leads_management_remove: The journey setting will be deleted and cannot be undone. The sync and updates will stop immediately. But existing records on the Data Board will not be affected.
journey_business_contact_collector_featu: We have you covered! The following features will be available for the team to help scale your business contact database once you activate this journey.
Capture individual contacts with essential details
Create and save contacts with vital information in the 'Contacts' Data Board. Assign teams for easy follow-up and engagement.
Create multiple contacts on the 'Contacts' Data Board using mass entry for consistent information, streamlining workflow.
Import contacts via structured CSV files
Consolidate your business contact database by importing existing contacts in the required format to the 'Contacts' Data Board.
journey_business_contact_collector_whats: After saving and activating, you'll find the 'Business Contact Collector' journey card added to your 'Org Journeys' collection. Begin managing your contacts and incoming leads. Created contacts will be saved to your 'Contacts' Data Boards.
journey_business_contact_collector_indiv: Fill out the fields below, and the created contacts will be saved to your “Contacts”Data Board with the provided info. If a similar contact record is detected, you will be prompted for duplicates.
journey_business_contact_collector_captu: New contacts have been saved to your contacts data board. You can start to engage with them now.
journey_business_contact_collector_phone: At least one field is required for Phone or Email
journey_business_contact_collector_help_: Hi, I need help to upload my CSV files to contacts through the Business Contact Collector Journey.
journey_business_contact_collector_multi: Create contacts in bulk by filling out the fields below, or import with CSV files in the required format. The created contacts will be saved to your Data Board with the provided information.
Enter the contact information below. If the contacts are from the same company or share the same tags, you can use “Shared Info Between Contacts” to stay productive.
Prepare the files in the required format and upload them below. To include information outside of fields in the template, please <1>contact iMBrace support.</1>
Entered information will be saved to all individual contacts
Add event, behavior, interest, activity, etc. tags to segments
Create individual contacts here with the shared info
journey_business_contact_collector_csv_t: 1. Download the template with the required format.
2. Add your data to the template files.
journey_business_contact_collector_remov: The journey setting will be deleted and cannot be undone. But existing records on the Data Board will not be affected.
journey_installation_limit_modal_title: Only one {{name}} Journey should be installed for each organization.
journey_installation_limit_modal_desc: Your organization has installed the {{name}} journey. Visit the org journey and start to use it now or stay to review the settings of the installed journey.
journey_form_management_brief: Create and manage forms with customized fields for your purpose. Easily share the forms, collaborate with your team, review the results and collect new contacts.
journey_form_management_why_use: Streamline the business activity process, boost productivity, and maximize lead generation
journey_form_management_description: A comprehensive solution for business activities and lead capture. Seamlessly create and manage forms for various purposes, from conference sign-ups to in-person check-ins. Collaborate with your team, control access, and assign ownership effortlessly. Share collection forms via dynamic URL, QR code, or embed code, and review all collected submission results on Data Boards and Contacts CRM. Monitor submission status and maximize business growth with Form Management today!
journey_form_management_short_descriptio: Create and manage collection forms with access control and analytics. Easily share and review results on designated data boards.
journey_form_management_feature_basics_d: We have you covered! The following features will be available for the team to help streamline your form management process once you activate this journey.
journey_form_management_feature_basics_s: Create and manage forms with essential details
Create collection forms with all the information that you need saved to associated Data Board and new contacts captured to CRM Contacts automatically .
Manage forms with the right team through form access control and form ownership assign.
Share and monitor form submission progress

Distribute collection forms through URL, QR code, or embedded code. Monitor form submission progress. Connect collection forms with campaigns to get detailed metrics on form opens and incorporate advanced analytics.
journey_form_management_ready_to_use_wha: You’re almost there! Once you save and activate, the Form Management Journey will be set up for you. Now you can manage all your forms in the journey. Create new forms with new data boards, or create a few forms sharing the same data board for form result collection. All new contacts will be automatically saved to CRM Contacts for you.
journey_form_management_form_empty:
Create your first <1>collecting form</1> now 
 and start to engage with your customers!

journey_form_management_delete_form_desc: The setup will be deleted and can not be undone. Any shared collection form will become invalid immediately. But existing records on the Data Board and CRM Contacts will remain unaffected.
journey_form_management_public_share_des: Collected result of the form will be saved to Data Board “{{name}}”

journey_start_schedule_desc: Create a new {{type}} and schedule to send at a later time

journey_document_ocr_feature_basics_desc: We have you covered! The following features will be available for the team to help streamline your form management process once you activate this journey
journey_document_ocr_feature_basics_sect: Effortlessly digitize information from various documents

Easily scan business cards, invoices, contracts, or any other document using the OCR tool, automatically extracting key details such as names, contact info, and text. Save time by avoiding manual data entry.
Seamless integration with the Data Board

All scanned document details are instantly organized and imported into the Data Board. This ensures that important information, whether from business cards or other documents, is readily available for review, follow-up, or analysis.
Boost efficiency during business events and beyond

Handle large volumes of documents with ease, from business cards to contracts. Capture, store, and manage information quickly, allowing you to focus on networking, project management, or data analysis.
journey_document_ocr_whatsapp_section_2_:
If the documents are scanned successfully, the contact information from business cards will be saved to the <crmTag><bold>CRM</bold> 'Contacts'</crmTag>. For other
 documents, the information will be saved to the <docHubTag><bold>Document OCR Hub</bold></docHubTag>.
Save to the default data board,

 'Installed' page. Start managing your contacts, documents, and incoming leads. Scanned
 information will be automatically saved to your 'Document OCR Hub' Board or CRM 'Contacts'.

You can find all your added journeys on the “Installed” tab on “Journeys” page and change the settings
 you’ve walked through with the card action menu “Edit Setting”.
